title: ophrys fusca subsp. lupercalis
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. lupercalis, also known as the 'Fusca Bee Orchid' or 'Lupercal Bee Orchid', is a rare subspecies of orchid found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ophrys fusca subsp. lupercalis include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, which are said to possess these beneficial properties.
